The '''YV-545 light freighter''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] in an attempt to replace the aging [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]].

==Characteristics==
The YV-545 had a cylindrical hull, with the cockpit mounted to the side like most CEC designs. The YV-545 was considered to be sturdier and more maneuverable than the YT-series vessels, though lacked the visual appeal of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]. In flight the cockpit rotated 90 degrees to be on top of the starship, while the body remained beneath. Though the ship could land in this configuration as well, most buyers saw this design as too complex.<ref name="RECG" />

Its body was ringed by sensors and maneuvering thrusters, which gave it exceptional maneuverability. It could rival most starfighters in performance and was a popular ship with smugglers and pirates, who liked to modify the YV-545 into an attack ship.

==History==
Although designed as the next generation of [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] Engineering Corporation freighters, the YV-545 never quite gained the popularity of its predecessor. The ''[[Midnight Star]]'' was a YV-545 light freighter.

[[File:Yv545-recg.jpg|left|thumb|A YV-545 freighter being escorted by a pair of [[Pinook fighter]]s.]]
